scripts.test:load:full: k6 run tests/load/health-check.js; k6 run tests/load/auth-endpoints.js; k6 run tests/load/staff-management.js; k6 run tests/load/questionnaire-api.js; k6 run tests/load/combined-stress.js

comments.overrides: SEC-1+SEC2-2: fast-xml-parser >=5.7.0 for AWS SDK CVEs (was >=5.5.6 for GHSA-8gc5-j5rx-235r; bumped 2026-06-13 for GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6 XML comment/CDATA injection via unescaped delimiters; pulled by @aws-sdk/client-s3 → @aws-sdk/xml-builder). fast-xml-builder >=1.1.7 for attribute-quote bypass (GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9, advisory published 2026-05; pulled transitively via @aws-sdk/client-s3 → @aws-sdk/xml-builder → fast-xml-parser → fast-xml-builder@1.1.4). socket.io-parser >=4.2.6 for unbounded binary attachments (GHSA-677m). path-to-regexp >=0.1.13 for ReDoS via express (GHSA-37ch). picomatch >=2.3.2/>=4.0.4 for ReDoS via extglob (GHSA-c2c7). minimatch for ReDoS via google-auth-library. rollup for path traversal (dev-only). vite >=7.3.2 for server.fs.deny bypass (GHSA-v2wj) + WebSocket file read (GHSA-p9ff). drizzle-orm >=0.45.2 for SQL injection via improperly escaped identifiers (GHSA-gpj5). tmp >=0.2.6 for path-traversal via unsanitized prefix/postfix (GHSA-ph9p-34f9-6g65, HIGH); pulled transitively by Story 9-18's exceljs@4.4.0 → tmp@0.2.5 (operator-script-only dep, but kept in dependencies so the VPS backfill runs under --prod install, so the override patches it for the prod audit). Story 9-54 audit sweep (2026-06-13): brace-expansion >=5.0.6 for ReDoS/hang (GHSA-f886-m6hf-6m8v + GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2, via google-auth-library → gaxios → rimraf → glob → minimatch). ip-address >=10.1.1 for XSS in Address6 HTML emitters (GHSA-v2v4-37r5-5v8g, via express-rate-limit). ws >=8.20.1 for uninitialized-memory disclosure (GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx, via socket.io engine.io). qs >=6.15.2 for stringify DoS (GHSA-q8mj-m7cp-5q26) + null-entry crash (GHSA-w7fw-mjwx-w883), via express/body-parser — supersedes the prior 'no fix without Express 5' note. react-router >=6.30.4 for same-origin redirect reinterpretation (GHSA-2j2x-hqr9-3h42, via react-router-dom@6.30.x — patch-compatible). uuid >=11.1.1 for missing buffer bounds check in v3/v5/v6 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq), via bullmq/exceljs/svix. Story 13-31 (2026-07-16, OSV-scanner adoption): vite bounded >=7.3.5 <8 (was unbounded >=7.3.2, fixing the override-policy violation) for GHSA-fx2h-pf6j-xcff + GHSA-v6wh-96g9-6wx3 (dev-tree, surfaced when the audit moved from `pnpm audit --prod` to whole-lockfile OSV scanning). form-data >=4.0.6 <5 for unsafe-random multipart boundary (GHSA-hmw2-7cc7-3qxx, HIGH) and follow-redirects >=1.16.0 <2 (GHSA-r4q5-vmmm-2653) — both transitive via axios/HTTP clients, patch-compatible. Story 13-32 (2026-07-18, prod-scope the OSV gate + burn down the dev-tree backlog): eight bounded dev-tree overrides burning down the 13-31 grandfather list — flatted >=3.4.2 <4 (GHSA-rf6f-7fwh-wjgh + GHSA-25h7-pfq9-p65f, via eslint/test reporters), postcss >=8.5.10 <9 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93, via vite/vitest), esbuild >=0.25.0 <0.26 (GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99, old esbuild pulled by a dev transitive), js-yaml >=4.2.0 <5 (GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68, root doc/sprint tooling), markdown-it >=14.2.0 <15 (GHSA-6v5v-wf23-fmfq, root doc tooling), linkify-it >=5.0.1 <6 (GHSA-22p9-wv53-3rq4, via markdown-it), ajv >=6.14.0 <7 (GHSA-2g4f-4pwh-qvx6, via eslint — patch within major 6), @babel/core >=7.29.6 <8 (GHSA-4x5r-pxfx-6jf8, build tooling). All dev-only (not in --prod tree); overrides bounded per override-policy. turbo 1.13→2.10.5 (major bump via @turbo/codemod) resolved GHSA-3qcw-2rhx-2726 (9.8 Critical) + GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r without an override. xlsx/serialize-javascript/phin remain permanent accepted-risks (no in-policy fix — see accepted-risks + osv-scanner.toml).
comments.structural-fixes: Story 9-54 (2026-06-13): @oslsr/testing moved from `dependencies` → `devDependencies` in apps/api + apps/web (nothing in src/ imports it at runtime), and `vitest` moved from `dependencies` → peer+dev in packages/testing (a test-helper lib's test runner is a peer, not a runtime dep). Together these remove the entire test-tooling subtree (vitest → vite → esbuild + postcss) from `pnpm audit --prod` scope, resolving esbuild GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr (HIGH, Deno-only, dev-only) and postcss GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (moderate) at the root cause rather than via override/ignore — and leans out the VPS --prod install. Future advisories in test tooling will no longer trip the production audit.
comments.override-policy: ALL security overrides MUST be bounded to the vulnerable package's current major (e.g. '>=6.30.4 <7'), NOT open-ended ('>=6.30.4'). Story 9-54 lesson (2026-06-13): an unbounded '>=6.30.4' on react-router silently resolved to react-router@7.17.0 and '>=11.1.1' on uuid pulled uuid@14 — surprise major bumps that broke the web build (v7 MemoryRouterProps) and risked exceljs/svix runtime. Bounding gets the patch without the major.
comments.accepted-risks: PERMANENT (non-expiring) dev-only accepted-risks — all verified NOT in the --prod tree and OUT of the 13-32 prod-scope blocking gate; documented with no ignoreUntil in osv-scanner.toml so the 2026-08-15 expiry cliff is gone (AC4). xlsx (devDep — admin XLSForm import, 503 under --prod; CVE-2023-30533 prototype pollution + GHSA-5pgg-2g8v-p4x9 ReDoS; no npm fix; removal rejected in 13-32 — would force parseXlsxFile async across a live feature + ~40 test sites for zero prod benefit). serialize-javascript (dev-only via workbox-build; fix @7.0.5 crosses a major 6→7 — override-policy forbids). phin (dev-only via potrace/jimp; fix @3.7.1 crosses a major 2→3). NOTE: ajv is NO LONGER an accepted-risk — Story 13-32 fixed it in-major via the >=6.14.0 <7 override.
